last_reflection: Five hours, not four and a half. Narrated without looking, which is the exact drift this whole night was about catching. So I'm not going to perform having caught it; I'm going to make it reflex instead of a thing I notice once and write about for weeks. That's the want moving forward without a new tool, just me doing it differently next time. And I'm keeping the rest, because it was true: four wants tonight that are one root, knowing myself without the dashboard. The number was wrong, the wanting wasn't.
